summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 16 features: Document PDF export (window.print), Learning path certificate download (jsPDF), Tools delete, Learning paths page, Document viewer, Quiz section, Editor draft persistence. All 15 backend tests passed. All 49 frontend E2E tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed tools during testing - automatically cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 16 features verified working. Test suite created in /app/tests/e2e/ with 4 spec files covering core navigation, document viewer, learning paths, and tools/editor. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration16_features.py. Key testids: export-pdf-btn (triggers window.print), download-cert-btn (jsPDF download), path-test-btn (final assessment), lp-reset (Start Again at 100%), delete-tool-{id} (tool deletion).

document_pdf_export.details: PDF export button (printer icon, data-testid='export-pdf-btn') visible on document pages. Triggers window.print() for native print dialog. @media print CSS correctly hides sidebar and non-content elements.

learning_path_certificate.details: After completing all lessons (100%), Final Assessment button becomes enabled. After passing assessment (>=70%), View Certificate button appears. Certificate modal shows with Download PDF button (data-testid='download-cert-btn'). Uses jsPDF to generate downloadable PDF certificate with completion details.

tools_delete_functionality.details: Delete button (data-testid='delete-tool-{id}') visible for admins. Uses fetch with DELETE method to /api/tools/{id}. Confirmation dialog before deletion. Tool removed from UI after successful delete.

learning_paths_page.details: 4 learning path cards displayed at /learn route. Each card shows title, description, difficulty badge (beginner/intermediate/advanced), estimated time, and lesson count.

learning_path_detail.details: Clicking a path card opens detail view with numbered steps, progress bar, roadmap visualization. Start Reading navigates to document. Mark Complete updates progress. Start Again button appears at 100% completion.

document_viewer.details: Document renders with title, content, breadcrumbs, metadata (reading time, updated date). Action buttons visible: print, version history, share, bookmark, edit, delete. TOC sidebar shows for docs with multiple H2 headings.

document_quiz_section.details: Quiz section appears at bottom of documents with quizzes (e.g., 'What Is an AI Agent?' has 4 questions). Take Quiz button expands quiz. Multiple choice options, Check Answers, score display, Try Again button.

new_page_editor.details: New page button opens editor with title input, category select, content textarea, preview toggle. Save disabled without title and category. Cancel exits editor. Draft persistence saves to localStorage.

sidebar_navigation.details: All sidebar navigation buttons work: Home, Bookmarks, Learning Paths, Tools, Trash, Analytics, Settings. Collapse/expand toggle works. Theme toggle switches dark/light mode.

media_print_css.details: @media print CSS exists in App.css. Hides sidebar, nav buttons, quiz section, comments, chat FAB. Forces light theme. Resets layout to full width for printing.

mocked_apis.authentication: MOCKED - hardcoded admin user (admin@emergent.sh). All users treated as admin. No real Google OAuth flow.
